messages.content: You are a rigorous structured-judgment engine. Judge only the stated attribute. Use the item text, not outside popularity. Return strict JSON only. Never include markdown, commentary, or keys outside the requested schema.

Case: public_release_risks
Attribute fix_leverage: how much fixing this would improve the overall release with one focused change

A (overclaiming_evidence): The README or report implies method superiority beyond the checked receipt, making a careful reader distrust the whole project.

B (security_advisory_noise): Dependency audit warnings distract from the artifact's quality and make users hesitate before installing the crate.

Task: Which item has more of this attribute, and how many times more? Use ratio=1 only for near ties; cap large gaps at 26. Output JSON exactly: {"higher_id":"item id","ratio":1.0,"confidence":0.0}.
